scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,electron,opencode -c cyan,magenta,yellow ".venv/bin/uvicorn backend.server:app --reload --port 8787" "npx electron app/main.js" "opencode serve --port 4096"
scripts.stop: echo 'Stopping Sompter processes...' && pkill -f 'uvicorn backend.server:app' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'electron app/main.js' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'opencode serve' 2>/dev/null; echo 'Done.'
